sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87822" key="prokoima/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προκοιμάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n87822.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go to sleep before,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἱ προκεκοιμημένοι</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">those who have died already,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antioch.Astr.</author> </bibl> </cit> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).110</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
